# Phylyps Trak II

## Summary

1994 Basic Channel release (BC-09) created by Mark Ernestus and Moritz von Oswald during the foundational period of Berlin dub techno.

## Why This Belongs in the Archive

Phylyps Trak II demonstrates how a world can emerge from extremely limited ingredients through persistence, repetition, signal processing, and gradual environmental change.

## WOS Relevance

Extremely high. The record functions as a model for autonomous broadcast systems, infrastructure ambience, persistence, and environmental worldbuilding.
